name: Tim Vine
bio: Tim Vine is an English comedian best known for rapid-fire puns and one-liners. He won the Perrier Newcomer Award at the 1995 Edinburgh Festival Fringe and once held the Guinness World Record for the most jokes told in an hour. He has twice won the award for best joke at the Edinburgh Fringe and also appeared in the sitcom Not Going Out.

timeline.ev: Develops his act at the Comedy Cafe in London
Sets Guinness record of 499 jokes in an hour
Wins best joke at the Edinburgh Fringe
Wins best joke at the Edinburgh Fringe again

accolades: Edinburgh Fringe best joke award (2010 and 2014)
Former Guinness World Record, most jokes told in an hour
